title: [CI:DOCS] Fix GitHub URL to Podman logo
body:
The Podman logo is not rendered on [docs.podman.io](https://docs.podman.io) with the current URL.

Signed-off-by: David Ward <david.ward@ll.mit.edu>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dpward*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@baude this does not seem to have been moved automagically to docs.podman.io yet.  Do we need to tweak an actual man page before it will push over the includes file?
